titleStmt.title: SII 17.583: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 583. (A.R. No. 538 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple. right of entrance.

This inscription commences with the praśasti Kaḍal śūḻnda pārmagaḷum, etc., of Rājādhirāja II. The details of date given, viz., Year 2, Mēsha śu. 6, Monday, Puṉarpūśam, regularly correspond to 1168 A.D., April 15, Monday, ·30; ·28. Dr. Kielhorn however has equated these details to 1164 A.D., March 30, ·85. The star, however, was current throughout Tuesday and continued on Wednesday till ·10 of that day according to the Indian Ephemeris.

This records a gift of two pieces of land by purchase as Rājādhirājapperuvilai from Tōṉṟi Mūvāyirattoruvaṉ, one of the tiruvīdi āṇḍār and a headman of Peruñār, tiruppudiyidūṭṭu viḷāgam (i.e., land whose fresh produce is entirely allotted for food offerings) by Paḻaiyaṉūr-uḍaiyāṉ Vēdavanam-uḍaiyān Ammai-Appan alias Rājarāja-viḻupparaiyan of Mēṉmalai-ppaḻaiyaṉūr-nāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.
1. The inscription is built in at the right end and incomplete.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kaṭal cūḻnta pārmakaḷum pūmakaḷuṅ kalaimakaḷum Aṭal cūḻnta pormakaḷuñ cirmakaḷum vantuvāḻa nāṟkaṭalcūḻ puviyeḻum pāṟkaṭalpol pukaḻparappa Ātiyukamāmennac cotimuṭi puṉaintaruḷi Aṟucamaiyamum Aimpūtamu neṟiyil vantu pārikkat tennavaruñ colaruñ ciṅkaṇarum mutalāya maṉṉavarkaḷ tiṟai cumantu vantiṇṭic cevippa Ūḻiyūḻi yoru ceṅko
l Eḻupārum Initaḷippac cempon virasiṁhāsanattu Ulakuṭai mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya korājakesarivanmarāṉatri bhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājādhirāja devaṟku yāṇṭu 2 meṣanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu ṣaṣṭhiyun tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyumpeṟṟa puṇar pūcattināḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu meṉmalaip paḻaiyaṉūr nāṭṭu paḻaiyaṉū ruṭaiyāṉ vetavaṉa muṭaiyā
ṉ Ammai Appaṉāṉa rājarājaviḻupparaiyaneṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvārur śrī mūlasthānamuṭaiyār tevatāṉattu Enakkuk kāṇiyāka rājādhirājap peruvilai tiruviti Āṇṭārkaḷiṟ peru ñār kiḻavaṉṟoṉṟi muvāyirattoruvanperil Anyanāmattāṟ koṇṭuḷḷa kāṇiyāṉa keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvārurk kūṟṟattut tiruvārurppāl rājarājaviḷāka
nilam �patma Oṉṟaraiye Orumāmukkāṇiyum noṭiyal karuṇāṭakac ceriyāṉa śrīnandi śvara viḷāka nilam 2�tma� Iraṇṭaraiye muṉṟumāmukkaāṇi muntirikai Ākanilam 4va� nālekāle Araimā muntirikaiyum Ikkoyil Ādicaṇḍeśvaradevar tirunāmattile kāṇiyākat tiruppūtiyutūṭṭu viḷākamāyk koyiluḻavu muṟṟūṭṭāk
kappoṉakappaḻanel naṭṭu Amutupaṭikku śrīpaṇṭārattile Aḷakkak kaṭavatāka Ādi caṇḍeśvaradevar śrīhastattu nirvārttuk kuṭutteṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu meṉmalaip paḻaiyaṉūr nāṭṭup paḻaiyaṉūruṭaiyāṉ vetavaṉamuṭaiyān Ammai Appaṉāṉa rājarājaviḻupparaiyaneṉ .Below this is engraved a portion of the praśasti of Rājādhirāja II in one line svastiśrīḥ— kaṭal cūḻn[ta] pāru makaḷum pūmakaḷuṅ kalaima[ka]ḷu[m]••••••••• [p]or makaḷuñ cirmakaḷumamarintu vāḻa nāṟkaṭal[cū]ḻ puviyeḻum pāṟkaṭa[l]pol pukaḻparappa ātiyukamā meṉṉac co[timuṭi] puṉaintaruḷi aṟucamai yamum aimpūtamu neṟi[yi]l vantu pārkkat�
Digital edition of SII 17.583 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
